name: delegate_task
description: Delegate a bounded sub-task to a specific agent runtime and return a structured result envelope.

agent_id.description: Target agent ID from config.json (for example OVR_PUB_07).

task.description: Precise sub-task prompt for the target agent.

inputs.description: Structured inputs passed to the sub-agent handoff context.

expected_outputs.description: Structured expected outputs used for orchestration contracts and merge safety.

allow_parallel.description: If true, request parallel execution with other independent delegation calls.

timeout_s.description: Maximum runtime budget in seconds for the delegated step.

step_id.description: Optional deterministic step identifier for DAG orchestration.

depends_on.description: Optional list of step_id dependencies that must complete first.
